# openwrt_firewall_redirect_ordering (Resource)

Relative order of firewall redirects (port forwards). OpenWrt applies redirects in the order they appear in the firewall config, and the first matching redirect wins, so overlapping redirects behave differently depending on their order.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ids` (List of String) Ids of the sections in the desired order. The sections are moved to the end of the config in this order; sections not listed are left untouched.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Id of this ordering. Always the UCI config and section type.
